description: X v2 API mirror with first-class Articles support — tweets, users, lists, spaces, bookmarks, likes via the official OpenAPI; long-form Articles authoring via browser-sniffed editor endpoints (GraphQL with rotating operation hashes).

novel_features.name: Markdown to tweet thread
novel_features.description: Split a markdown file into a numbered tweet thread. Atom-aware splitter honors paragraphs, list items, and code fences. Numbering suffix is reserved before packing so final tweet length stays within 280 chars.

novel_features.name: Markdown to X Article
novel_features.description: Parse a markdown file with YAML frontmatter (title, cover, tags) and convert the body to Draft.js content_state JSON — the format X's Articles editor accepts server-side via ArticleEntityUpdateContent. v1 supports text-only articles (paragraphs, H1/H2, ordered/unordered lists, blockquote, bold, italic).
